dashboard.label: VulnSentinel: Autonomous Security Agent
dashboard.description: Agentic Vulnerability Discovery, Deterministic Risk Engine, & Remediation Architecture

search.query: index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host | search host=* | stats count as total_cves dc(host) as unique_assets

div.div: VulnSentinel has successfully cross-referenced live intelligence data streams and mapped $cve_count$ active CISA KEV threats directly exposing $asset_count$ critical internal enterprise assets. Autonomous remediation workflows have been successfully dispatched via the Splunk MCP layer to isolate targeted network perimeters.

search.query: index="main" (sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" OR sourcetype="vulnsentinel:audit") | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host as asset_host, is_internet_facing, business_criticality | eval host=coalesce(asset_host, target_host) | search host=* | stats latest(cvss_score) as cvss_score, latest(is_internet_facing) as is_internet_facing, latest(business_criticality) as business_criticality, latest(known_exploitation) as known_exploitation, latest(status) as audit_status by host | fillnull value="N/A" is_internet_facing business_criticality known_exploitation | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(lower(is_internet_facing)=="true", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(lower(business_criticality)=="high" OR lower(business_criticality)=="critical", 20, lower(business_criticality)=="medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(lower(known_exploitation)=="true" OR known_exploitation=="True", 10, 0) | eval initial_risk = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | eval mitigated_risk = if(like(audit_status, "SUCCESS%"), (cvss_score * 5 * 0.4), initial_risk) | stats sum(initial_risk) as gross_risk, sum(mitigated_risk) as net_risk | eval reduction_pct = if(gross_risk > 0, round(((gross_risk - net_risk) / gross_risk) * 100, 1), 0.0) | fields reduction_pct
index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:audit" action="execute_autonomous_remediation" status="SUCCESS*" | stats count

panel.title: Targeted MITRE ATT&CK TTP Profile Distribution

search.query: index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | stats count by mitre_technique

index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, is_internet_facing, business_criticality | search host=* | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(lower(is_internet_facing)=="true", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(lower(business_criticality)=="high" OR lower(business_criticality)=="critical", 20, lower(business_criticality)=="medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = 10 | eval risk_score = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | eval risk_tier = case(risk_score >= 85, "Critical Exposure (>85)", risk_score >= 65, "High Exposure (65-84)", 1==1, "Medium/Low Exposure") | stats dc(host) as assets by risk_tier

panel.title: Agentic Security Operations Matrix (Powered by Foundation-Sec-1.1-8B)

search.query: index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, ip_address, is_internet_facing, business_criticality | search host=* | fillnull value="N/A" cve_id vulnerability_name vendor_project product host ip_address is_internet_facing business_criticality reference_url known_exploitation mitre_technique ai_remediation | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(lower(is_internet_facing)=="true", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(lower(business_criticality)=="high" OR lower(business_criticality)=="critical", 20, lower(business_criticality)=="medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(lower(known_exploitation)=="true" OR known_exploitation=="True", 10, 0) | eval risk_score = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | eval urgency = case(risk_score >= 85, "URGENT", risk_score >= 65, "HIGH", 1==1, "MEDIUM") | eval reference_url = if(reference_url=="N/A", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/"+cve_id, reference_url) | eval time_string = strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time_string, cve_id, host, mitre_technique, risk_score, ai_remediation, urgency, reference_url | rename time_string as "Detection Time", cve_id as "CVE ID", host as "Target Asset", mitre_technique as "MITRE TTP", risk_score as "Risk Index", ai_remediation as "Agent Remediation Plan", urgency as "Priority SLA", reference_url as "Threat Intel"

index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, is_internet_facing, business_criticality | search host=* | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(lower(is_internet_facing)=="true", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(lower(business_criticality)=="high" OR lower(business_criticality)=="critical", 20, lower(business_criticality)=="medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(known_exploitation=="True" OR lower(known_exploitation)=="true", 10, 0) | eval risk_score = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | timechart span=1h max(risk_score) as "Peak Asset Exposure Risk"
